heroHeadline: Five Centuries of Colombian History: From Muisca Gold to Total Peace
heroSubtitle: Spanning pre-Columbian civilizations, Spanish colonial Nueva Granada, independence wars, La Violencia, the FARC insurgency, narco-trafficking cartels, and the ongoing Petro peace process
footerNote: Data sourced from the Colombian Truth Commission (CEV), JEP, INDEPAZ, InSight Crime, Human Rights Watch, UNODC, and major international outlets.
